subcodes.first_line: We have verily manifested the Cause and sent down the verses, yet the people denied them after their revelation, save whom He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اظهرنا الامر و انزلنا الایات ولکن الناس کفروا بها بعد انزالها الا من شاء
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @thankfulness; gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
